title: crocus korolkowii
intro: Crocus korolkowii, also known as the Golden Ray, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Crocus, which belongs to the iris family. It is a perennial bulbous plant native to Central Asia, known for its vibrant yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Crocus korolkowii has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it has been used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
